scripts.pull: rclone copy gdrive:nia-coverage-master.csv data/ --drive-export-formats csv && echo '✓ Pulled Sheet → data/nia-coverage-master.csv'
scripts.push: rclone copy data/nia-coverage-master.csv gdrive: --drive-import-formats csv --drive-export-formats csv && echo '✓ Pushed CSV → Google Sheet'
scripts.refresh: npm run pull && npm run rebuild
